name: Cake Mix Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 each Yellow or White Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cake mix, peanut butter, oil, water, and eggs well by hand until combined.
2. Drop spoonfuls of dough 1 inch apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
3. Crisscross the cookies with a fork dipped in water.
4. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes at 350°F.
5. Remove from oven immediately and let cool on the baking sheet before transferring to a wire rack. Makes 3 to 4 dozen cookies.
